hook: AI gave you a 5-paragraph essay when you needed a yes or a no.
caption:
AI gave you a 5-paragraph essay when you needed a yes or a no.

You asked: "Should I take this job offer?"

Generic AI: *proceeds to write a 400-word exploration of work-life balance, compensation philosophy, and career trajectory considerations, ending with 'ultimately only you can decide'*

You: ...I know. That's why I asked YOU.

Here's the thing — AI defaults to comprehensiveness because it doesn't know you.

It doesn't know that you're a gut-check person who just needs someone to poke holes in your reasoning.

It doesn't know that you've already made the pro/con list three times.

It doesn't know that "helpful" to you means direct, not thorough.

So it plays it safe. Covers every angle. Offends no one. Helps no one.

When AI knows your thinking style — how you process decisions, what you actually need when you're stuck, how much hand-holding makes you want to close the tab — the whole interaction changes.

Same question. Completely different response.

That's what a BootFile does. It tells AI how YOUR brain works before you type a single word.

Stop re-explaining yourself every session. Start getting answers that fit how you actually think.

Link in bio to build yours.
